equivalence_argument: No complete mapping was found: the port has a raw FHE offset branch in decode_delivery_config, but the v2 delivery path rejects FHE as unsupported and no DeliveryConfig::from_fhe_abi implementation exists in the audited repo set.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing reachable FHE Phase 2 delivery settlement decoding via DeliveryConfig::from_fhe_abi; the local builder/verifier reject FHE before delivery settlement construction/verification.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ethereum/payload/src/ritual_async.rs contains FHE_PRECOMPILE => decode_delivery_config_at(input, 11), but prepare_delivery_settlement_transaction first calls ensure_supported_two_phase_metadata.
ensure_supported_two_phase_metadata allows only long-running HTTP, ZK, sovereign-agent, and persistent-agent; FHE is excluded.
crates/ritual-block-verification/src/lib.rs has the same supported two-phase set and a test asserting FHE is rejected as an unported fee family.
crates/transaction-pool/src/pool/async_pool.rs can read an FHE phase2 deadline offset, but that pool helper does not create or verify FHE delivery settlement config.
Searches across audited repos found no DeliveryConfig::from_fhe_abi or equivalent named FHE ABI decoder.

rationale: The commit adds a precompile-address branch for 0x0807 in create_delivery_settlement_transaction and maps decode failures to an explicit FHE delivery config error. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: When creating a Phase 2 delivery settlement for a contract job whose precompile address is 0x0807, the payload builder must decode target, selector, gas limit, fee, priority fee, and value with DeliveryConfig::from_fhe_abi rather than the long-running HTTP or ZK decoders.
suggested_falsification_tests: Pass FHE precompile input using the FHE field layout to create_delivery_settlement_transaction and assert the decoded delivery target/selector/gas match the FHE ABI offsets; pass the same input through the generic decoder path and assert it would fail or produce different values.
summary: FHE delivery config decoding is not ported into the reachable builder/verifier delivery path.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Submit an FHE delivery-ready job with FHE-layout callback fields; current local prepare_delivery_settlement_transaction should reject the precompile as unsupported before a DeliveryConfig::from_fhe_abi-style decode can occur.
title: FHE delivery config uses FHE ABI decoder
